pages.name: 01 Executive Overview
pages.purpose: Monitor GMV, transaction volume, revenue, take rate, contribution margin, and MoM growth.

pages.name: 02 Merchant & Transaction Drivers
pages.purpose: Diagnose merchant segment, payment method, channel, refund, chargeback, and top/bottom merchant drivers.

pages.name: 03 Margin & Scenario Planning
pages.purpose: Model fee revenue bridge, cost per transaction, margin sensitivity, and price/take-rate scenarios.
